difficulty Difficulty ● MODIFIED

FROM STARTwhen: Entry point of every run
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO race
if: Always
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR No special condition.
📌 NOTES
  • User can skip this wheel via the Skip button (sets diffMode to medium)
  • Cannot be disabled by user
▾ SEGMENTS (5) (click ✎ to edit branch)
Segment LabelWeightBranch / Route
Medium — default weights 50 standard routing
Easy — your favorites boosted 20 standard routing
Hard — rare segments 3x 15 standard routing
Extreme — rarest segments 10x 10 standard routing
Random — each wheel randomized 10 standard routing
race Race ● MODIFIED
▾
↙ INBOUND ROUTES
FROM difficultywhen: Always
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO white_euro
if: White Euro
TO latina
if: Latina
TO black_afro
if: Black Afro
TO north_asian
if: North Asian
TO south_asian
if: South Asian
TO persian_sub
if: Persian
Routes to Persian sub-wheel
TO indian_sub
if: Indian
Routes to Indian sub-wheel
TO native_sub
if: Native American
TO pacific_sub
if: Pacific Island
TO origin_[race]
if: Black US / Mixed / Other races
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR User toggled. Default next: white_euro. Actual next: next enabled wheel in sequence.
📌 NOTES
  • Sets raceGroup and hairGroup state variables which determine which variant wheels fire throughout the run
  • If disabled by user: default next = white_euro, actual next = next enabled wheel in sequence
▾ SEGMENTS (11) (click ✎ to edit branch)
Segment LabelWeightBranch / Route
White US 12 standard routing
White Euro 15 white_euro
Latina 13 latina
Black US 15 standard routing
Black Afro 18 black_afro
Indian 8 standard routing
Native American 6 standard routing
South Asian 8 south_asian
North Asian 10 north_asian
Persian 5 standard routing
Pacific Island 5 standard routing
sub_race_group Sub-Race Wheels (white_euro, latina, black_afro, north_asian, south_asian, persian_sub, indian_sub, native_sub, pacific_sub) GROUPED ● MODIFIED
▾
↙ INBOUND ROUTES
FROM racewhen: Segment matches sub-race label
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO origin_[specific] → age
if: Any segment
All origins route to nextEnabled("age")
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR User toggled. Default next: origin wheel or skin wheel. Actual next: next enabled in sequence.
📌 NOTES
  • Sets raceGroup and hairGroup for the entire run
  • All origin_* wheels route unconditionally to age

↙ INBOUND ROUTES
FROM heightwhen: Always
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO bodyW(&quot;stretch&quot;) — stretch_thin / stretch_mid / stretch_bbw
if: Always
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR User toggled. Default next: stretch_thin. Actual next: next enabled wheel in sequence.
📌 NOTES
  • Sets bodyGroup (thin/mid/bbw)
  • If anorexic/bulimic body type, milk_play will later skip ass_size and go directly to ass_shape with assSizeGroup forced to &quot;small&quot;

skin_light Skin Tone (Light/Medium/Dark) GROUPED ● MODIFIED
▾
↙ INBOUND ROUTES
FROM waist_[variant]when: Always (after body composition chain completes)
FROM origin_* or race (certain labels)when: When no origin sub-wheel exists for that label
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO freckles
if: raceGroup === &quot;light&quot;
TO raceW(&quot;eyes&quot;)
if: raceGroup !== &quot;light&quot;
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR Fires only when raceGroup === &quot;light&quot;. If disabled by user: default next = freckles or eyes wheel. Actual next: next enabled wheel in sequence.
📌 NOTES
  • Fires when raceGroup === &quot;light&quot;
  • Determined by race + sub-race result. Only one skin wheel fires per run.
  • If disabled by user: default next = freckles (light) or eyes wheel (medium/dark). Actual next: next enabled wheel in sequence.
  • VARIANTS: skin_light, skin_medium, skin_dark
  • VARIANTS: skin_light, skin_medium, skin_dark

if: Always

▾ SEGMENTS (46) (click ✎ to edit branch)
Segment LabelWeightBranch / Route
Round — full circle from all angles, symmetrical 20 standard routing
Teardrop — fuller at bottom, tapers toward chest at top 22 standard routing
Oval — elongated vertically, egg-shaped rather than round 12 standard routing
Hemispherical — flat against the chest, half-dome shape 14 standard routing
Conical — narrow at base, projects to a point 10 standard routing
Torpedo — like conical but more elongated, projects straight out 8 standard routing
Teepee — outer edges angle inward toward the nipple tip 8 standard routing
Bell shaped — narrow at top, dramatically wider at bottom 14 standard routing
Sloped — flat across the top, fullness only at bottom 12 standard routing
Ski slope — flat and empty across the top, sharp slope down 10 standard routing
Tubular — cylindrical, narrow, elongated downward 8 standard routing
Tuberous — narrow base, elongated, large puffy areola, tissue herniates forward 6 standard routing
Gummy bear — teardrop that holds its shape firmly regardless of position 10 standard routing
Relaxed — soft natural hang, no particular defined shape 18 standard routing
Pendulous — large and heavy, hang significantly downward 12 standard routing
Ptotic — nipple sits at or below the breast fold, significant droop 10 standard routing
Chandelier — extremely pendulous, hangs dramatically low, almost to the navel 6 standard routing
Waterfall — flows over and cascades dramatically downward, no structure 8 standard routing
Cone with droop — conical base but tip sags, nipple points toward floor 8 standard routing
Bottom heavy — most mass in the lower pole, hangs low 14 standard routing
Upper pole full — most fullness in the top half, sits high 14 standard routing
Wide base — large attachment point, spreads wide with minimal projection 12 standard routing
Narrow base — small attachment point, all mass projects forward 10 standard routing
East-West — nipples point outward in opposite directions, spread to sides 12 standard routing
Asymmetrical — one noticeably different size or shape from the other 10 standard routing
Symmastia — tissue merges across sternum, no gap at all, true uniboob 6 standard routing
Close set — barely any gap, almost touching but still separate 10 standard routing
Side set — wide spacing, significant chest visible between them 10 standard routing
Separated with valley — distinct visible valley between them, deep crease 12 standard routing
Full cleavage natural — creates deep cleavage without support 14 standard routing
No natural cleavage — breasts naturally separate, gap widens without support 12 standard routing
High attachment — tissue starts high on chest wall 10 standard routing
Low attachment — tissue starts low on chest wall, makes them appear longer 10 standard routing
Pectoral shelf — sits prominently on top of a very developed pectoral muscle 6 standard routing
Pillow — very soft, spreads wide when lying down, loses shape without support 14 standard routing
Lateral spread — spreads dramatically to the sides when lying down 12 standard routing
Overflow — so large they spill over the sides of the chest and downward 8 standard routing
Athletic — small and firm, sits high on developed pectoral, minimal tissue 10 nipple_size
Perky — firm, upward-pointing regardless of size, defies gravity 14 nipple_size
Buoyant — larger than expected but sits higher than their size would suggest 10 standard routing
Stuck on — very round and firm, unnaturally high and rigid, implant aesthetic 8 standard routing
Deflated — skin without much volume, stretched, like after weight loss 8 nipple_size
Post-feeding — deflated and stretched with larger areola, lost volume but kept skin 6 standard routing
Stretch marked — stretch marks across the breast tissue itself from growth 8 standard routing
Veiny — veins visibly present through the skin especially toward the top 8 standard routing
Barely there — almost flat, just a slight mound with nipple present 8 nipple_size

▾ SEGMENTS (21) (click ✎ to edit branch)
Segment LabelWeightBranch / Route
Rock solid — no give at all, completely rigid 6 standard routing
Very firm — barely gives when pressed, holds shape in any position 10 standard routing
Firm — some give but springs back immediately, holds shape well 16 standard routing
Medium — gives naturally, slight sag without support but nothing dramatic 22 standard routing
Soft — noticeable give, changes shape with position and gravity 20 standard routing
Very soft — significant give, drapes and moves freely with any change 16 standard routing
Doughy — extremely soft and pliable, almost no internal structure 10 standard routing
Saggy — has lost firmness, hangs with gravity, no rebound 10 standard routing
Bouncy — springs back when released, elastic quality, high rebound 14 standard routing
Jiggly — moves with any motion, ripples and settles 14 standard routing
Dense — firm but not hard, heavy for their size, substantial 12 standard routing
Spongy — compresses easily but springs back slowly, delayed rebound 10 standard routing
Floppy — flops and shifts with any motion, no resistance at all 8 standard routing
Taut — skin stretched tight over the volume, feels full of internal pressure 10 standard routing
Gummy — firm but with a rubbery give, compresses then pushes back 8 standard routing
Watery — almost liquid feeling inside, shifts like fluid with movement 8 standard routing
Supple — soft but with youthful elasticity, gives and bounces back naturally 16 standard routing
Weighted — feels heavy when held or cupped, gravity pulls noticeably 12 standard routing
Uneven — different firmness in different parts of the same breast 8 standard routing
Pillowy — very soft with significant volume, sinks when pressed 12 standard routing
Silicone-like — unnaturally smooth and uniform internally, implant feel 8 standard routing

Segment LabelWeightBranch / Route
Round — full circle, symmetrical 18 standard routing
Bubble — round with more pop and lift 20 standard routing
Heart — fuller at bottom, tapers at top 18 standard routing
Square — wide set, boxy silhouette 10 standard routing
Wide — spreads laterally more than it projects 14 standard routing
Teardrop — fuller at bottom, hangs with gravity 16 standard routing
Pear — widest at hips, narrows toward waist 12 standard routing
Apple — round and full, projects evenly in all directions 16 standard routing
Onion — extremely round and symmetrical, almost perfect sphere 12 standard routing
Cantaloupe — very round and dense, firm 10 standard routing
Elongated cheeks — both cheeks long vertically, long crack, regardless of overall size 10 standard routing
Tall silhouette — taller vertically than wide overall 8 standard routing
Wedge — wider at top near lower back, narrows toward thighs 10 standard routing
Ski slope — flat across top, curves dramatically outward toward bottom 10 standard routing
Booty shelf — flat on top, strong outward projection below 12 standard routing
Double bubble — two very distinct cheeks, defined split down center 14 standard routing
Narrow — more depth than width, small side-to-side 8 standard routing
Hip dominant — hips much wider than ass, ass looks smaller by comparison 10 standard routing
Mismatched — asymmetrical, one cheek noticeably different 6 standard routing
Petite round — small but well shaped, compact 12 standard routing
Disproportionate — much larger than the body would suggest 10 standard routing
Pancake — wide but very thin, no projection 6 standard routing
Stacked — so much mass it creates visible folds or shelves 8 standard routing
Cakes — very full, very round, stacked, the whole package 14 standard routing
Under-butt visible from front — crease visible facing forward 8 standard routing
Saddlebag — outer thigh fat connects into ass, no clear boundary 10 standard routing
Love handle merge — love handles flow directly in with no distinction 10 standard routing
Outer thigh overlap — mass extends onto outer thighs 10 standard routing
Separated — wide gap between cheeks, visually distinct 12 standard routing
Tight crack — cheeks press together with virtually no gap 10 standard routing
Creased — deep pronounced under-butt crease 12 standard routing
Banana fold — bottom crease extremely pronounced, visible through clothing 10 standard routing
Clapping — cheeks make contact when walking 8 standard routing
Athletic — firm, toned, not necessarily large but defined 12 standard routing
Sprinter — muscular and round, athletic but with significant projection 10 standard routing
Runner — flat and toned, minimal projection, clearly trained 8 standard routing
Mommy — softer, lower set, spread wider, lost its shape 8 standard routing

Deep rather than wide — projects significantly forward, narrow side to side 10 standard routing

▾
↙ INBOUND ROUTES
FROM modewhen: Non-roleplay mode labels (Wife, Lover, Pet, Sub, Slave, Spiteful Friend, FWB, Superior, Subordinate, Housekeeper, Groomed Protégé, etc)
FROM breeding_wheelwhen: mode is Mother/Sibling/Aunt/Cousin/Teacher
FROM mothering_depthwhen: kink is non-dom AND mode = Mother
FROM sibling_depthwhen: kink is non-dom AND mode = Sibling
FROM auntcousin_depthwhen: kink is non-dom AND mode = Aunt/Cousin
FROM teacher_depthwhen: kink is Light/Gentle Dom or non-dom AND mode = Teacher
FROM dark_psychologywhen: End of Mother/Sibling/Aunt-Cousin dom abuse chain
FROM college_abuse_psychologywhen: End of Teacher dom abuse chain
↗ OUTBOUND ROUTES (click ✎ to edit)
TO baby_talk
if: kink is any dom label OR mode is Mother/Sibling/Aunt/Cousin/Teacher
TO disobedience
if: kink is non-dom AND mode is non-roleplay
🔘 DISABLE BEHAVIOR User toggled. Default next: baby_talk or disobedience. Actual next: next enabled wheel in sequence.
📌 NOTES
  • Key branching point: checks BOTH kink and mode results

  • Reroll segments trim the results array from the target wheel forward before routing
